caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman with red hair tied back and wearing a blue patterned top is attentively listening. On the right, an older man with a white beard, glasses, and a blue shirt is speaking, likely discussing the themes or content of the poems. The background includes decorative elements like string lights and framed pictures, suggesting a casual yet thoughtful setting for the dialogue. The overall tone seems reflective and serious, aligning with the gravity of the climate crisis topic.
